metadata.defaultDescription: Shop local, sell everywhere. LAAS24 is a modern multi-vendor eCommerce platform with WhatsApp ordering.

home.subtitle: LAAS24 connects Somali vendors and buyers with a fast marketplace, shareable store links, and one-tap WhatsApp ordering—built for real commerce, not just browsing.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Browse products from verified Somali vendors. Filter by category, region, and price.
marketplace.intro: Live product feed from LAAS24 vendors. Filter by category, region, and price—then add to cart or order on WhatsApp.
marketplace.loadError: Could not load products. Is the API running?
marketplace.emptyDefault: No products listed yet. Check back when vendors add inventory.
marketplace.emptyFiltered: No products match your filters. Try adjusting price, category, or search.

catalog.featuredSubtitle: Live listings from vendors on LAAS24—browse the full catalog with filters on the marketplace.
catalog.featuredEmpty: No products yet. When vendors add inventory, featured items appear here.
catalog.topStoresSubtitle: Live vendor storefronts on LAAS24. Visit a store to browse their catalog.
catalog.topStoresEmpty: No stores yet. Vendor registrations will appear here.

cart.singleStoreError: You can only order from one store at a time.
cart.title: Your cart
cart.subtitle: One store per cart. Checkout via WhatsApp saves your order and opens the store on WhatsApp with your list and order ID.
cart.unavailable: Some items are no longer in the catalog. Remove them below or clear your cart.
cart.multiStoreHint: Clear your cart and add products from one store only.

storesPage.title: All stores
storesPage.subtitle: Live vendor storefronts on LAAS24. Open a store to see products and contact sellers on WhatsApp.
storesPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by store name or city…

auth.configError: Add JWT_SECRET to your environment (see backend and frontend .env examples) so protected routes and sessions work.
auth.passwordResetOk: Password updated. You can sign in now.

footer.tagline: A modern multi-vendor marketplace for Somalia and beyond—optimized for speed, sharing, and WhatsApp-first ordering.
